claim_bullets.bullet_text: Alraune are artificial plants created from human blood, with no fertility and no weakness to fire, unknown if they can be created from other sources (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.214-221).

source_record_text: This section covers various undead monsters and creatures found in the Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, including alraune, flowers, fungus, buau zombies, skeletons, zombies, ashes, ghouls, sins, wights, haunts (including ghosts, specters, and phantoms), jack-o-lanterns, and dullahans.
